rounds.prompt: How many times higher in frequency is the top piano note than the lowest?
rounds.fact: The lowest piano note is 27.5 Hz; the highest is 4,186 Hz — 152× higher in frequency, spanning over 7 octaves.

rounds.prompt: How many times faster does light travel than sound in air?
rounds.fact: Sound travels at 343 m/s; light at 299,792,458 m/s — 874,000× faster. This is why you see lightning before you hear thunder.

rounds.prompt: How many times louder is a jet engine than normal conversation (in decibels as power)?
rounds.fact: Every 10 dB is 10× more sound intensity. 80 dB difference = 10⁸ = 100 million× louder. The decibel scale is logarithmic.

rounds.prompt: How many times longer is a radio wave (AM) than a visible light wave?
rounds.fact: Visible light has wavelengths of ~500 nanometres; AM radio waves are ~300 metres — about 600 million× longer.

rounds.prompt: How many times longer is the wavelength of red light than violet light?
rounds.fact: Violet light is ~400 nm; red light is ~700 nm — about 1.75× longer wavelength. This small difference creates the entire visible rainbow.
